provider.description: AI provider override (anthropic / openai / google). Host default routes when omitted.

model.description: Model id override. Host default for the chosen provider when omitted.

temperature.description: Defaults to 0.3 — VoC extraction is precision-oriented; high temperature would hallucinate quotes.

maxTokens.description: Max output tokens. Defaults to 4096; raise for long-form content with many candidate quotes.
